share.title: Kitabu Ubangiji Tilora
share.text: Lord'a tilon, Kitaburo labar kura kalakkin — Yesu nangaro isin'a.

s.ui.footer: Kitabu Ubangiji Tilora · Ayatasua Kitabu Ubangijiro (LMT) ngawkagono
s.hero.title:
Kitabu Ubangiji,
lord'a tilon
s.hero.sub: Lord'a tilon, Kitaburo labar kura kalakkin — Yesu nangaro isin'a.
s.thread.eyebrow: JUMLA TILO YE LAWAN PIRENZE HAƊAGIN
s.thread.h2: Cikaro, Kitabu Ubangiji labar tilo ye
s.thread.note: Allah alkawal (alkawal) digono, am karam kura suturo digei, cikaro kuwa lawan pirenze Yesun cikin cikawa degano. Lawan mata 13 kasaro letenanze zaro nanyen biye — kati pirenzen “Wuriye kalantuye” dunuye labar zaron-ye.
s.gospel.lead: Kitabu Ubangiji kitabu koyarwa “am gana” degaro bago.
s.gospel.sublead: Labar ye Allah, alheri tilon, am zunubilan kalanza ceto degei bantsoro ceto digono. Tsakiyalan kuwa Yesu Almasihu gono.
s.gospel.mirror:
Isra'ila da'ira kaburo bago atemma gono “wuro” hoto

Gum sujada→Wahala→Allahro fando→Allah ceto digin→Gum sujada wuriye…

Alƙalai karamlan zaman bauta-ro, Isra'ila da'ira atema kaburo bago maimaita digono. Kitabu Ubangiji atema ngubunza bago “Adaiwa gano,” degaro ngawkago bago.

Madubi ye. “Isra'ila atema digo” degaro bago, sai “wu ye atemma nangin” (1 Korintiyawa 10:11).

Gum am-am sassaƙa digo tilon bago. Lawan piren Allah-laro wuriye hangin ko aminkin ye — kuɗi, nasara, yabo, am, wuro ye. Allah lawan nangin yiro sabab dingaro tilakin atema ye gum sujada gono.

Cikaro, gum kaburo lan zurfi atema ye “wu, Allah kursiya lan letegin.”
s.gospel.coreIntro: To, ndaro Allah am zunubi atemma ceto digin? Bishara Kitabu Ubangiji shela digin tushe atema gono.
s.gospel.crux:
Kitabu Ubangiji pirenze wuro tiloro tunjikin.

Am da'ira zunubi kanza karya digaro bantsoro, kuma am adalci tilo ye bago. Sabab atemaro am tiloye nanza-ro bashinza biya digin dole gono.

Yesu koyarwa gana yiro tilon isin bago. Wuro ceto dingaro lawan piren bago-ro, dole isin gono.

Giciye atema lan rate dingaro kamata digo am atema wu gono.
Yesu zunubinjin ngawko, nanjin-ro kafgano.

“Amma aka yi masa rauni saboda zunubanmu, Aka daddoke shi saboda muguntar da muka aikata… Dūkan da aka yi ta yi masa, ya sa muka warke.” — Ishaya 53:5
s.faq.q1: ▸ To, am am bukin tilon gaskata digin sama-ro letin, am gana suro ngo digo amma gaskata bagandiye jahannama-ro letin?
s.faq.a1:
Lardo ma'ana ye. Amma lardo ndi suron tunjuro bago.

① Kitabu Ubangiji am “am gana am dibi” degaro raba bago. Ma'auni “am piren-laro wuriye gono” degaro bago, sai “Allah tsarki cikan.” Shilan, am “gana cikan” ye bago (Romawa 3:23). Sabab atemaro “am gana am bukin” degaro bago, sai am ndi caben dibi bukin lan kalanza — tilo magani ngawkin, tilo kuwa fando, “Wu nan-laro wuriye laife nangin” degin.

② Lawan tilon sama jahannama-bero raba digin. Lawan dibi-dibi ngawko ngaro bago, sai Yesu Almasihu Ubangiji-ro ngawkemia, zunubinjin matsala kuwa warware degano. Am zunubinza Almasihu bunza-ro warware degin sama-ro letin; am ngawko bagandiye, zunubinza saꞋa lan, letin bago. Lawan gana piren ye zunubi matsala atema kanza warware dingaro bantsoro.

Sabab atemaro sama jahannama-bero “lawan gana ngo lada” degaro bago, sai Almasihu-bero dangantaka lardo gono. Kuma “gaskatawa” fikir-bero yarda bago, sai am suro nange jagora digin canji — am ngawko gonon ye laife bago, sai zurfi-ro wuriye tuba digin. Hakika, kanza adalci dingaro (“wu am gana ye”) gum kaburo lan karya dingaro wuya gono, atema Almasihu fando bago degaro andiye fikir digin (Luka 18:9-14).

Kitabu Ubangiji shilan ngubukin: “Duk wanda ya gaskata da shi, ba za a yi masa hukunci ba. Wanda kuwa bai ba da gaskiya ba, an riga an yi masa hukunci” (Yohanna 3:18). Hukunci “nuwa karaganzemia suro nange dibi-dibinjin ngawkagin” degaro bago, sai Almasihu ngawkemia ko bago lardo tabbat degano.

Romawa 3:23 · Yohanna 3:18 · Afisawa 2:8-9 · Luka 18:9-14
s.faq.q2: ▸ Yesu gaskata bagaro suro gana yiro tilon dingaro bantsoba?
s.faq.a2:
Atema fikir am piren digo gono, amma matsala gono atema kuskure digin. Misal nangiye.

Ngalkaram am fashin njibe-bero suro nangemia digaye. Bene tsafta dingaro kamata digo, am ngalka-ro alheri dingo, suro ngo dingo — saꞋa kuwa nyi am fashin njibe gono, ngalka nyiro letenanze nangaro (tasha hukunci) ngawkago-ro. Matsala “lawan dibi-dibinjin ngawkagin” degaro bago, sai “ngalka suro nangemia digin” (asalinjin) gono.

Sabab atemaro bishara “am gana dingaro wuriye ngoji digiye” degaro bago; “ngalka canjiye” degin. Ngalka zunubi-laro kasaro letiye Yesu-ro ƙetariye — asali wura Allah tada-ro. Atema dibi-dibinjin ngoji-ro ngawkagin bago, sai am muszi feteji digo aminkemia, ngalkanza-ro ƙetare digiye.

Hakika Kitabu Ubangiji ceto atema tsallakawa-bero misal digin — “Ya tsamo mu daga mulkin duhu, ya maishe mu ga mulkin ƙaunataccen Ɗansa” (Kolosiyawa 1:13).

Kuskure digiye bago: atema suro gana sabab bago degaro bago. Gana ceto “sharaɗi” bago, sai tadanza. Am ngalka canjigo saꞋa suro gana ngoji-ro bago digin, sai tada hangaro-ro digin.

Kolosiyawa 1:13 · Yohanna 1:12 · Yohanna 3:3 · Afisawa 2:8-9
s.faq.q3: ▸ Am laife suro salama-bero nangemia, “Allah wuro gafara digo,” degemia, am laife digonon saꞋa kuwa wahala kalakkin — alheri ngubu njibe digo bago?
s.faq.a3:
Lardo ma'ana ye, ciwo kuwa gono ye. Amma iƙirari atema “Kitabu Ubangiji gafara” bago — karkatarwanza ye.

① Allah gafaranza ngubu njibe digaro bantsoro. Zunubi “lardo gano bago” degaro ngambzin bago; Allah kanza bashinza tadanza ndurun biya digo. Giciye “zunubi cuku-ro ngawkago” shaida bago, sai zunubi nauyi cikan ye — gafara dunya-ro tsada lan.

② Tuba gono tada digin. Am laife am laife digonon shilan laife digemia — “Allah wuro gafara digo, suro salama-bero nangin” — atema tuba bago, sai kwaikwayonza (Mattiyu 3:8). Gafara am Allah-bero kuwa am laife digonon ciwonza ngambzin bago, ko gafara dingaro tilakin bago.

③ Zunubi “letiye” degaro bantsoro. Zunubi pirenze wuro tilon ndi suron biyagin — ko Almasihu giciye atema lan ngawkin (am gaskata digei hukunci saꞋa bago, Romawa 8:1), ko am cikaro fando digo kanza ngawkin. Sabab atemaro “gafara njibe” bago. Am laife kuwa dunya atema lan alhaki shari'a digin (Romawa 13:1-4).

④ Am laife digonon ngijinza Allah shilan cuku bago. Allah am ngijin digei-bero ngijin digin, ngijin pirenze fikir digin, cikaro kuwa kanza ngambzin (Ru'ya ta Yohanna 21:4). Sabab atemaro am laife digonon ramuwa nauyinza kanza ngawkin bago, sai Allah adalci-ro danƙa dingaro lawan piren (Romawa 12:19 — “Ramuwa tawa ce, ni zan saka, in ji Ubangiji”).

Mattiyu 3:8 · Romawa 8:1 · Romawa 13:1-4 · Ru'ya ta Yohanna 21:4
s.respond.sub: Hangaro atema bayani bago, sai kira. Hangaro nanjin-ro kafgo karaganjin tasgemia, addu'a atema hankali-ro, tilo tilo ngalaye diye.
s.respond.prayer:
Ya Allah,

wu am zunubi kanza ceto dingaro bantsoro yarda nangin.

Yesu giciye atema lan wuro sabab numgin, wuriye fetegin gaskata nangin.

Zunubinjin pirenze wuro gafara diye, kau-laro kuwa suro nangin Ubangiji-ye.

Tadanjin-ro ngawkiye, suro fua dingaro diye.

Yesu cinla-ro addu'a digin. Amin.
s.respond.after: Addu'a atema gono digemia, Kitabu Ubangiji Allah tada degano ngubukin. SaꞋa kanjin tilon bago — ikkilisiya bunyen nyiga nangiye am piren-bero bangaskiya zaro letiye.
s.respond.read: Kitabu Ubangiji kanjin kalantuye — Yohanna-ro mbejiye
s.respond.verse: “Amma duk iyakar waɗanda suka karɓe shi… ya ba su ikon zama 'ya'yan Allah.” — Yohanna 1:12 · Romawa 10:9-10
s.closing.verse: “ko mutuwa ce, ko rai … ko kowace irin halitta ma, ba za su iya raba mu da ƙaunar da Allah yake yi mana ta wurin Almasihu Yesu Ubangijinmu ba” — Romawa 8:38-39
s.closing.small:
Labar zaro atema lan, Shari'a, kitabu Waƙa, Annabawa, Wasiƙu “njim” wuriye degin.
Kau-laro, kitabu piren dunemia, labar suro ndaron nangemia kalakkin.
s.about.line: Ikkilisiya Furotesta Koriya am piren am ra'ayi tarihin fansa-bero ngago gono (bishara · Reformed).
s.about.contact: Lardotasua · ra'ayi — Imel andiro shituye
s.bridge.note: Kanuri-lan Kitabu Ubangiji saꞋa bago — ayatasua nanyen Hausa-lan gono.

epochs.title: Halitta
epochs.one: Allah dunya “gana cikan” digo halitta digo.
epochs.events: Halitta kawu araskin, am Allah hoton halitta degano, Asabar njiraye
epochs.q: A sa'ad da Allah ya fara halittar Sama da duniya,
epochs.christ: Dunya “Kalma” lan halitta degano. Bishara Yohanna atema Kalma Yesu kanza gono ngubukin (Yohanna 1:1-3).
epochs.detail:
Kitabu Ubangiji falsafa hujja-bero dunin bago, sai furuci-bero: “A sa'ad da Allah ya fara halitta…” Dunya haɗari bago, sai Allah ndurun aikinza gono.

  • Allah hoto · Halitta pirenze lan, am tilon Allah-bero misal halitta degano — atema kalakkin, dunya kuwa kula dingaro.
  • Njiraye · Kau tulurkin njiraye lawan piren cikago salama (shalom) digo tunjikin: “gana ye.”
  • Adan · Dunya lalace bagandiye, Allah am-bero zaro letenanze.
epochs.next: Amma cikawa atema rushe dingaro gab degano…

epochs.title: Bunuwa
epochs.one: Zunubi shigo, am Allah-bero alaƙanza yangin degano.
epochs.events: Kalwu njagago bago kuskin, Adan-laro fitago, nu wahala-bero isago
epochs.q: Zan sa ƙiyayya tsakaninka da matar… shi zai ƙuje kanka.
epochs.christ: Bishara alkawal mbeji, Bunuwa giwo dunon ngago: “kam tada” kanjira kanza ƙuje digin — atema kuwa Yesu gono (Farawa 3:15; Romawa 16:20; Galatiyawa 4:4).
epochs.detail:
“Allah-bero misal nangin” degaro biyayya bagandiye-bero, zunubi dunya-ro shigo. Sakamakonza doka keta digo tilon bago, sai dangantaka tarwatse degin.

  • Alaƙa karyago · Allah-bero (tunjin), kanza-bero (laife dujin), yanayi-bero (kayan wahala).
  • Nu · gargaɗi “lalle numbu” degano gono degano.
  • Farawa 3:15 · saꞋa kuwa hukunci tsakiyalan, alkawal ceto giwo isin. Malamtasua atema protoevangelium (bishara mbeji) kiragin.
epochs.next: SaꞋa Allah am tilon fansa mbejigaro kira digin…

epochs.title: Kakatasua
epochs.one: Allah Ibrahim-ro alkawal digo, “Albarka sabab ye dingaye.”
epochs.events: Ibrahim-bero alkawal, hadaya-ro Ishaku ɗaure degano, Yakubu tada megu indi, Yusufu Masar-lan mukami-ro saꞋago
epochs.q: Zan kuwa maishe ka al'umma mai girma… domin ka zama sanadin albarka.
epochs.christ: Alkawal “dunya am pirenze albarka saꞋagei” degin Yesu, Ibrahim tada-bero cikago (Galatiyawa 3:16).
epochs.detail:
Allah am dunya pirenze matsalanza am tilon, Ibrahim, kira digo mbejigo magance digin. Tushe atema alkawal gono — al'umma kura, kabela, “dunya am pirenze-ro albarka.”

  • Bangaskiya · Ibrahim alkawal nogono bago gaskata digo, atema adalci-ro lasafta degano (Farawa 15:6).
  • Ishaku Yakubu · alkawal giwo-ro letin; Yakubu (Isra'ila) kabila megu indi tojin.
  • Yusufu · kanjianza ngeptso amma mukami-ro ngagago — “Allah alheri-ro maishe digo” (Farawa 50:20).
epochs.next: Yusufu nanyen, suntalanza Masar-ro kasaro letei — bayi kuwa degei…

epochs.title: Fitago Jeji-bero
epochs.one: Allah am bayi degei ceto digo kanza-ro maishe digo.
epochs.events: Annoba megu, Idin Ƙetarewa, Bahar Maliya ƙetare degano, Sinai-lan Doka Megu, Alfarwa, jeji-lan kar 40
epochs.q: Zan tallafe ku, ku zama jama'ata, ni kuwa in zama Allahnku.
epochs.christ: Idin Ƙetarewa — dimi tadanza bunza nu juyar digin wura — Yesu-ro tunjikin, “Idin Ƙetarewa dimi tadanze,” andiga-ro giciye degano (1 Korintiyawa 5:7).
epochs.detail:
Alkawal Gana fansanza kura. Isra'ila zaman bauta lan dega Allah ikonza-bero 'yanto degano, am-nza-ro kafgano.

  • Idin Ƙetarewa · fato dimi tada bunza-bero alama digo nu ƙetare digin — hadaya nanyen isago pirenze tushenza gono.
  • Bahar Maliya · lawan piren ngafo dimi ceto; “ƙetarewa” mbeji fua-ro alama degano.
  • Sinai alkawalnza · Doka-bero Allah am-nza degei ndaro zarogei koyi degei.
  • Alfarwa · wuro tsarki dega motsi digin, dimi Allah am-nza tsakanlan letegin — “Immanuwel” dandanonza.
  • Kar 40 · biyayya bagandiye-bero zaman tilo jeji-lan yawo digin, amma Allah manna ginshiƙi girgije wu-bero bunza-ro letin.
epochs.next: Kabela alkawal sambalan tsei, shiga dingaro shiriri digei…

epochs.title: Kabela Ngawkago Alƙalai
epochs.one: Kabela saꞋagei, amma maina bago piren-piren lawan tasanza-ro tunjin digei.
epochs.events: Yariko bunago, Kan'ana-lan zaro letei, zunubi–hukunci–ceto da'ira maimaita digin
epochs.q: A lokacin ba sarki a Isra'ila, sai kowa ya yi ta yin abin da ya ga dama.
epochs.christ: Rut tada-laro Dawuda fitin, Dawuda tada-laro kuwa Yesu fitin (Mattiyu 1). Hargitsi suron ye, Almasihu tada giwo-ro letin.
epochs.detail:
Yoshuwa kasaron kabela alkawal-ro shigei, amma zaro lete giwo Allah ngambzei. Alƙalai tushe atema maimaita digin gono.

  • Da'ira kasaro letin · zunubi → danniya → Allah-ro ngijin → alƙali ceto digin → zunubi wuriye. Wuriye dibi degin tilon.
  • Alƙalitasua · Gidiyon, Samson, Debora — karam cuku ceto digei, jarumtasua amma laife kuranza.
  • Rut · zaman tunjin-lan aminci labar wuga; kam baꞋa Dawuda (Yesu) tada-ro shigin.
epochs.next: Kabela ngijin digei, “Andiro maina ye yiye!”…

epochs.title: Maina Haɗaɗɗe
epochs.one: Allah Dawuda-ro alkawal digo, “Kursiya sarautanjin har abada dawwama digin.”
epochs.events: Maina mbeji Shawulu, Dawuda Goliyat-bero, Dawuda-bero alkawal, Sulemanu haikali ngafo digo
epochs.q: Gidanka kuwa da mulkinka za su dawwama a gabana har abada. Gadon sarautarka kuma zai kahu har abada.
epochs.christ: “Kursiya sarauta har abada” Yesu, Dawuda tada-bero cikago — sabab atemaro “Dawuda Tada” kiragin (Luka 1:32-33; Mattiyu 1:1).
epochs.detail:
Isra'ila kaburonza, maina yasge maina digei.

  • Shawulu · maina kabela nyiga digo; mbeji gana biyayya bagandiye ɓata digo.
  • Dawuda · “am Allah karaganza-bero.” Goliyat tulu digo Urushalima birni kura-ro maishe digo. Zunubi kura (Batshebatu) digo amma karaganza-laro tuba digo (Zabura 51).
  • Dawuda-bero alkawal (2 Sama'ila 7) · Allah Dawuda daulanza har abada kafgaro alkawal digo — Almasihu begenza tushenza kura.
  • Sulemanu · hikima arziki kaburonza-lan haikali ngafo digo, amma suronza cikaro gum-ro juyo digo.
epochs.next: Sulemanu nanyen, maina kashi indiro rabin…

epochs.title: Maina Rabago
epochs.one: Kudu (Yahuda) arewa (Isra'ila)-ro rabin, al'umma kuwa lalace-ro kasaro letin.
epochs.people: Maina maina indi; annabitasua Iliya, Ishaya, Irmiya
epochs.events: Maina rabin, gum sujada yaɗu digin, annabitasua gargaɗi digei
epochs.q: Da haka mutanen Isra'ila suka tayar wa gidan Dawuda har wa yau.
epochs.christ: Zaman atema lan annabitasua Almasihu isin shilan annabta digei (Ishaya 9:6; Ishaya 53).
epochs.detail:
Sulemanu tada zamanlan al'umma rabin: Isra'ila maina arewa (kabila 10, birni kura Samariya) Yahuda maina kudu (kabila 2, birni kura Urushalima).

  • Isra'ila (arewa) · maina pirenze gum sujada digei; 722 K.H.-lan Assuriya-ro bunin.
  • Yahuda (kudu) · Dawuda tada giwo-ro letin, maina gana cuku Hezekiya Yosiya degei, amma pirenze kasaro letin.
  • Annabitasua · Iliya, Amos, Ishaya, Irmiya “juyuye!” kiragei. Almasihu annabcinza ngubu lan nanyen saꞋago (Ishaya 53 “bawa wahala kalakkin”).
epochs.next: Cikaro hukunci gargaɗi degano isin — bauta-ro ngeptso degei…

epochs.title: Zaman Bauta
epochs.one: Al'umma rushe digo kabela kabela baꞋaro ngeptso degano.
epochs.events: Isra'ila Assuriya-ro bunago (722); Yahuda Babila-ro bunago haikali kuwa rushe degano (586)
epochs.q: A bakin kogunan Babila Muka zauna muka yi ta kuka, Sa'ad da muka tuna da Sihiyona.
epochs.christ: BaꞋanjin zurfilan Irmiya “alkawal fua” alkawal digo (Irmiya 31:31) — alkawal atema Yesu Buwu Cikaro lan kafgano.
epochs.detail:
Gargaɗi cikago. Haikali fando degano kabela Babila-ro ngeptso degano — kabela, maina, haikali ngafei: matsayi cuku kaburonza.

  • Bunuwa indi · Isra'ila (Assuriya, 722 K.H.) Yahuda (Babila, 586 K.H.).
  • Daniyel · arna fadalan ye bangaskiya koyinza (kuya bunyilan); “maina madawwami” isin wahayonza nogono.
  • Bege tartsatsi · Ezekiyel wahayi kaski susu ndurun digei (Ezekiyel 37) Irmiya “alkawal fua” degano tunjin suron makoma-ro tunjikin.
epochs.next: Kar tuluwiye nanyen, Allah lawan piren dunin — fato-ro letei…

epochs.title: Fato-ro Letei
epochs.one: Letei haikali garu kuwa wuriye ngafei.
epochs.events: Sairus dokanza-bero letei, haikali wuriye ngafei, Urushalima garunza gyara digei, Allah Lardonza mayar degano
epochs.q: Farin cikin da Ubangiji ya ba ku shi ne ƙarfinku.
epochs.christ: Malaki, Alkawal Gana kitabu cikaronza, manzo Almasihu lawanza shiriri digin annabta digo cikago: “Manzonjin shitukin” (Malaki 3:1).
epochs.detail:
Sairus maina Farisa dokanza-bero (538 K.H.) fato-ro letei mbeji. Igiya yasge-lan letei lawan lalace degano wuriye ngafei.

  • Zarubabel · haikali wuriye ngafo (516 K.H.-lan cikago).
  • Ezira · Allah Lardonza wuriye koyar digo bangaskiya farfaɗo digo.
  • Nehemiya · Urushalima garunza kau 52-lan wuriye ngafo.
  • Esta · Yahudawa Farisa-lan halaka-laro ceto digo — “karam atema-ro.”
  • SaꞋa kuwa fando digei · haikali tsei, amma maina Dawuda-bero bago. Kabela Almasihu suturo digei.
epochs.next: Sai kuma… sama shiru digo misal, kar 400 letei.

epochs.title: Kar Shiru
epochs.one: Kar 400 annabi cimanza bago — saꞋa kuwa dandali shiru-ro shiriri degano.
epochs.q: Amma da lokaci ya yi sosai, sai Allah ya aiko Ɗansa, haifaffen mace.
epochs.christ: “Dandali shiriri” pirenze atema Allah aikinza gono, Yesu “karam cikago” gono-lan isin-ye.
epochs.detail:
Malaki-laro Alkawal Fua-ro, kimanin kar 400 Nassi fua bago letei. SaꞋa kuwa tarihi nanyen Allah bishara-ro lawan piren shiriri digin.

  • Daula musko canji digei · Farisa → Girka (Iskandari, 333 K.H.) → Ptolemiyawa Selukiyawa → Makkabiyawa tawayenza (167 K.H.) → Roma (63 K.H.).
  • Girka cinla · Iskandari nasaranza-bero Girkanci cinla gama gari-ro maishe digo; Alkawal Gana Girkanci-ro fassara degano (Septuagint), bishara sauri-ro yaɗu dingaro lawan piren dunago.
  • Roma lawan salamanza · lawan gana “Roma Salama” mishan lawan kuranza degei.
  • Majami'u ƙungiyatasua · majami'a koyarwanza tushe digo; Farisiyawa Sadukiyawa taso degei; Almasihu begenza kuwa tunjin.
epochs.next: Sai kuma shiru karye degano — cikaro, isin.

epochs.title: Yesu Isin
epochs.one: Almasihu alkawal degano isin, numgin, wuriye fetegin.
epochs.people: Yesu, almajira megu indi, Yahaya Baftisma Digin
epochs.events: Allah jiri-bero tunjin, hidimanza koyarwanza mu'ujizanza, giciye atema lan nu, kau yasgelan kasku-laro fetegin
epochs.q: Kalman nan kuwa ya zama mutum, ya zauna a cikinmu… yana mai matuƙar alheri da gaskiya.
epochs.christ: Kam tada (lawan 2), Ibrahim albarkanza (3), Idin Ƙetarewa dimi tada (4), Dawuda maina har abadanza (6), alkawal fua (8) — pirenze am tilon, Yesu, cikin cikago: annabi andiye gono, firist, maina.
epochs.detail:
Shiru karye degano; Am Alkawal Degano isago. Bishara dege Yesu ndurunza, nunza, fetenza musko degelan shaida digei.

  • Jiri-bero tunjin · Allah am degano (Immanuwel, “Allah andibe-bero”), Baitalami wuro cuku-ro.
  • Hidima · Allah mainanza koyar digin, am cuku digei warkar digin, am zunubi kira digin. “Am wuga nogono, Aba nogono.”
  • Giciye · Bunuwa (lawan 2) zunubi nu-bero isago bashinza andiga-ro biya digin. Idin Ƙetarewa dimi tada gono.
  • Kasku-laro fetenza · kau yasgelan fete digo, zunubi, nu, Shaiɗan ikonza karya digo — giciye atema lan tuni “masarauta am ikonza makamanza ƙwace digo… nanza nasara digo” (Kolosiyawa 2:15).

Sabab atemaro Yesu annabi andiye gono (Allah-ro lawanza tunjin), firist andiye gono (jirinza-bero zunubi-ro kafara digin), maina andiye gono (zunubi, nu, Shaiɗan nanza nasara digo, har abada kuwa maina digin).

epochs.title: Ikkilisiya Mbejigin
epochs.one: Ruhu isin, bishara kuwa dunya samba-ro yaɗu digin.
epochs.events: Fentikos-lan Ruhu kasaro isin, ikkilisiya tojin, bishara Urushalima-laro Roma-ro tsanani-bero yaɗu digin
epochs.q: Amma za ku sami iko sa'ad da Ruhu Mai Tsarki ya sauko muku… har ya zuwa iyakar duniya.
epochs.christ: Labar atema saꞋa kuwa giwo-ro letin. Kitabu Ubangiji Yesu wuriye letin lawan piren fua digin alkawal-bero cikago (Ru'ya ta Yohanna 21).
epochs.detail:
Yesu sama-ro le giwo, Ruhu alkawal degano Fentikos-lan isin ikkilisiya kuwa tojin. Bishara ngarguro yaɗu digin.

  • Fentikos · Ruhu almajira ngarum digei jarum shaida-ro juyar digin.
  • Bitrus · Urushalima-lan Yahudawa-ro bishara shela digo.
  • Bulus · am tsanani digonon-laro manzo-ro, Al'ummai dunyalan ikkilisiya kafgin wasiƙu kuwa ngawkin.
  • Dunya samba-ro · Urushalima → Yahudiya → Samariya → Roma. Ibrahim-ro “dunya am pirenze” alkawalnza cikago.
  • Andi-bero · labar ngafo bago; Yesu wuriye isin sama fua dunya fua-ro giwo-ro letin.

epochs.title: Mayarwa (Lawan Piren Fua)
epochs.one: Yesu wuriye letin lawan piren fua digin.
epochs.events: Indilan isin, hukunci cikaro, zunubi·nu·ngijin ngafo, sama fua dunya fua
epochs.q: zai share musu dukkan hawaye. Ba kuma sauran mutuwa, ko baƙin ciki, ko kuka, ko azaba.
epochs.christ: Halitta mbeji Adan cikaro “Urushalima Fua”-ro mayar degano. Allah am-nza-bero har abada letegin — Immanuwel cikawanza (Ru'ya ta Yohanna 21:3; Mattiyu 1:23).
epochs.detail:
Kitabu Ubangiji ikkilisiya zamanlan ngafo bago. Kitabunza cikaronza, Ru'ya ta Yohanna, Yesu lawan piren kammala dingaro wuriye letin tunjikin.

  • Indilan isin · maina alkawal degano ɗaukaka-ro letin.
  • Nasara cikaro · Shaiɗan nu-bero har abada hallaka degano, Almasihu kuwa Maina Mainatasua-ro maina digin (1 Korintiyawa 15:25-26; Ru'ya ta Yohanna 20:10).
  • Hukunci kasku fetenza · laife pirenze gyara degano, kaskutasua kuwa fetin.
  • Sama fua dunya fua · zunubi, nu, ngijin, azaba har abada ngafei (Ru'ya ta Yohanna 21:4).
  • Adan mayar degano · mbeji-laro gana “Urushalima Fua”-lan, Allah am-nza-bero har abada letegin — makoma Kitabu Ubangiji pirenze nangaro letin.

Sabab atemaro saꞋa zaman “tuni, amma saꞋa kuwa atema bago” gono: Yesu suron ceto tuni cikago, amma cikawanza saꞋa kuwa suturo digin.
epochs.next: To, labar atema pirenze “wuro” nangaro ndaro?

love: Labar hukunci-bero mbejin bago, sai halitta hangaro-bero zubgo-bero mbejin.
Am zunubi karam digei-lan, Allah giwo wuro atema lan ceto alkawal digo.
Allah am cancanta bago-ro giwo isin, cinla-bero kira digo, albarka sabab-ro maishe digo.
Am bayi degei nishinza tasago kanza ceto dingaro kasaro isin.
Amananza degei degei ngago, saꞋa kuwa karam ngijin digei pirenze am ceto digin shitukin ngagago.
Dawuda bunago ngambzin bago, nanza-bero kuwa Maina har abadanza alkawal digo.
Am bunza juyo degei-ro, annabitasua shitukin giwo-ro letin, ngijikin, “Fato-ro letuwe.”
Bauta kabela tunjin kaburonza-ro ye nanza-bero letego, mayarwa kuwa alkawal digo.
Am degei degei kasago-ro ye, alkawalnza janye digo bago.
Kar 400 shirunza-laro ye, tunjuro, ceto lawanza shiriri digin.
Am zunubi karam dega, Tadanza ndurunza fetegaro shitin.
Hangaro andiye ngawkago, saꞋa dunya pirenze-ro kwararo digin shitukin.
Cikaro ngijin pirenze ngambzin lawan piren kuwa hangaro-bero mayar digin.

mis.w: “Allah am zunubi dingaro lawan pirenze nangaro digo? Andi halitta digo bago wuriye gana bago?”
mis.t: Allah dunya am-bero rashi-ro halitta digo bago, sai hangaro ngubu cikan-ro. Am Allah-bero dangantaka dega am-ro halitta digin kanza hangaro gono. Zunubi shigonza ye Allah ceto lawanza-laro fito bago (Afisawa 1:4-5). Kitabu Ubangiji lawan mbejinza hukunci bago, sai hangaro.

mis.w: “Kalwu tilon kusgo-ro fitago nu kuwa ngacin — Allah ngubu njibe digo bago?”
mis.t: Adan-laro fitago hukunci gono, karam tilon jinƙai kuwa gono. Kaski ndurun kalwunza ku, hal karyago Allah-laro yankago atema lan har abada suro fua dingaro, wahala suron har abada jingina dingaro degano (Farawa 3:22). Nu yarda digo fato-ro letin lawanza dunago, wuro atema lan kuwa Allah Am Ceto Digin alkawal digo (Farawa 3:15). Hangaro hukunci suron tuni letegano.

mis.w: “Ibrahim bangaskiya kuranza dega-ro ngabzo degano — Kitabu Ubangiji am pirenze ɗabi'a jarumtasua bago?”
mis.t: Ibrahim apar digo shakka kuwa digo; Yakubu am ruɗu gono. Allah am “cancanta dega” kira digo bago, sai am kasago, alheri-bero. Sababnza ganaza bago, sai Allah hangaro amininza (Kubawar Shari'a 7:7-8).

mis.w: “Shari'a (Doka) ceto saꞋagaro dole cigin jarrabawa bago?”
mis.t: Allah Shari'a ngacin giwo ceto digo. Doka Megu ye ceto furuci-bero mbejin: “Wu ye Ubangiji Allahnjin, Masar kabela-laro fittugo” (Fitowa 20:2). Shari'a “ceto saꞋagaro kiyaye diye” degaro bago, sai am tuni ceto degei ndaro zarogei hangaro jagoranza (Kubawar Shari'a 7:7-9). Alheri giwo isin pirenzelan; biyayya kuwa amsanza gono.

mis.w: “Kan'ana ngawkago tausayi bago am tulu gono — sabab atemaro Allah Alkawal Gana zalunci digin gono.”
mis.t: Lardo atema wuya gono, jumla tilon warware dingaro bantsoro. Amma Kitabu Ubangiji tashin hankali zato-ro gabatar digo bago, sai mugunta ngubu (tada hadaya ye) karam karam haƙuri nanyen hukunci-ro (Farawa 15:16; Kubawar Shari'a 9:4-5; Litafin Firistoci 18:24-25). Allah hukunci-ro ye jinkiri digin, am nanza-ro juyo degei kuwa karaganza-ro ngawkin — am baꞋa Rahab Rut ye (Yoshuwa 6:25; Rut 4:13-17).

mis.w: “Dawuda jarum aibu bago gono — sabab atemaro ‘am Allah karaganza-bero’ kiragano.”
mis.t: Dawuda zina digo am bukin ye digo. “Am Allah karaganza-bero” aibu bago degaro bago, sai am zunubinza tunjin digo bago — am gono tuba digo Allah-ro giwo-ro fato digin (Zabura 51). Allah hangaronza am njibe-ro bunago ngambzin bago.

mis.w: “Annabi am duba giwo annabta digin gono / Allah Alkawal Gana fushi tilon gono.”
mis.t: Annabi karaganza “giwo annabta digin” bago, sai Allah ngijinza zafi-bero: “Allah-ro letuwe fato-ro.” Hukunci gargaɗinza ye niyyanza halaka bago, sai am juyar digo ceto dingaro — “am dibi nunza-ro farin ciki nangin bago” (Ezekiyel 33:11).

mis.w: “Zaman bauta Allah Isra'ila pirenze ngambzin tabbat digo.”
mis.t: Zaman bauta ngambzin bago, sai tada hangaronza-ro horo tsarkakewa kuwa gono (Ibraniyawa 12:6). Allah letin bago; bauta tsakiyalan Daniyel-bero letego alkawal kuwa digo, “Lawanjin nogono nangaro digin… Lawan alheri… Giwo karagajin tsuwro ngajin” (Irmiya 29:11).

mis.w: “Kar 400 lardo bago-ro, Allah letin ko njiraye digin.”
mis.t: Shiru bago dingaro bago. Lardo digo bago tilon, karam atema pirenze ceto dandalinza shiriri dingaro daula, cinla, lawan piren motsa digin. Karam shiru kaburonza-lan, Allah ngarguro aiki digin, hangaro suron (Galatiyawa 4:4).

mis.w: “Yesu am koyar ɗabi'a gana tilon gono / giciye baꞋanjin shan kashi gono.”
mis.t: Yesu kanza Allah gono tunjin digo (Yohanna 8:58), giciye kuwa haɗari ko shan kashi bago, sai hangaro shiriri degano. Ngarguro nanyen ja degano bago; ndurunza kanza fetego (Yohanna 10:18). “Hangaro atema-ro wuriye am-ro bago, am aminanza-ro ndurunza fetego” (Yohanna 15:13).

mis.w: “Ikkilisiya am kamala dega ƙungiya, ko fato tilon gono.”
mis.t: Ikkilisiya al'umma “tsarkaka kamala dega” bago, sai am zunubi gafara degei. Manzo Bulus ye kanza “am zunubi kura” kira digo (1 Timoti 1:15). Ikkilisiya mbeji ye gardama digo kasago kuwa (Ayyukan Manzanni 6:1; 1 Korintiyawa 1:11). Wuro fariya bago, sai am hangaro ngawkagei isar digei (Yohanna 13:34-35).

core.title: Zunubi asali — am adalci bago
core.body: Matsala “lawan dibi cuku” bago, sai karagan tushenza. Adamu-laro, am pirenze zunubi kasaro tojin am Allah-ro kanza saꞋagaro bantsoro.
core.vtext: Babu wani mai adalci, babu, ko ɗaya … 'yan adam duka sun yi zunubi, sun kasa kuma ga ɗaukakar Allah

core.title: Shari'a wuro ceto dingaro bantsoro
core.body: Shari'a tsani bago, sai madubi. Ngoji digin wuriye, ndaro kasago tunjin wuriye. Manufanza Almasihu-ro andiga kaigin.
core.vtext: ta Shari'a ne mutum yake ganin laifinsa … Shari'a ta zama uwargijiyarmu da ta kai mu ga Almasihu

core.title: Alheri-bero — kyauta, ngoji bago
core.body: Ceto lawan cancanta digo ladanza bago, sai am cancanta bago-ro kyauta gono. Sabab atemaro am tilo ye fariya dingaro bantsoro.
core.vtext: ta wurin alheri ne aka cece ku saboda bangaskiya … ba kuwa saboda da aikin lada ba, kada wani ya yi fariya

core.title: Bangaskiya-bero kuɓuto degano
core.body: Shari'a kiyaye-bero bago, sai Yesu Almasihu suron bangaskiya-bero, am adalci-ro lasafta degano — adalcinde-bero bago, sai nanza-bero.
core.vtext: mu kuɓutattu ne ta wurin bangaskiya … mutum ba ya samun kuɓuta ga Allah ta wurin bin Shari'a, sai dai ta wurin gaskatawa ga Yesu Almasihu kaɗai

core.title: Kitabu Ubangiji Yesu-ro tunjikin
core.body: Kitabu Ubangiji am kura kitabunza ko taimako kanza bago. Farawa-laro Ru'ya ta Yohanna-ro, shafi pirenze am tilon — Yesu Almasihu — shaida digin.
core.vtext: su ne suke shaidata … ya yi ta bayyana musu abubuwan da suka shafe shi a dukan Littattafai

core.title: Allah Mainanza — Yesu saƙo tsakiyanza
core.body: Jigo Yesu wuriye koyar digo. Allah Mainanza Maina-ro dunya atema-ro Yesu-bero shigo wuriye letin giwo kammala digin. Giciyenza fetenza-bero, Yesu Maina andiye gono, zunubi, nu, Shaiɗan nanza nasara digo.
core.vtext: Lokaci ya yi, Mulkin Allah ya kusato. Ku tuba, ku gaskata da bishara

core.title: Bishara — lawan piren kammala digo
core.body: Zunubi bashinza wu biya dingaro bantsoba, Yesu giciye atema lan wuro nanjin-ro biya digo, fetenza-bero kuwa nu nanza nasara digo. “Atema diye” bago-ro aminkin, sai “cikago” lan.
core.vtext: An gama … tun muna masu zunubi, Almasihu ya mutu dominmu
